2603-020593"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":47.11,"top":514.99,"width":234.22,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"상기내용은진행,협의등상황에따라변동될수있습니다."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":47.11,"top":531.55,"width":502.45,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"협력사에서는반드시전자서명완료후에작업에착수해주시기바랍니다(예정공사착수일이후서명시서명일이공사착수일)."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":47.11,"top":548.11,"width":494.76,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"향후수급사업자의귀책,기존계약범위에포함등의사유로추가/변경작업이아닌것으로객관적으로확인될경우본서면은"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.92,"top":560.08,"width":38.33,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"무효입니다."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":35.17,"top":18.91,"width":168.41,"height":7.03,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"양식명(코드):작업지시서(GMS-CPN-001)"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":467.67,"top":18.91,"width":93.09,"height":6.09,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"문서번호:2603-020593"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":35.17,"top":516.72,"width":247.16,"height":6.4,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"○상기내용은진행,협의등상황에따라변동될수있습니다."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":35.17,"top":532.66,"width":515.28,"height":7.34,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"○협력사에서는반드시전자서명완료후에작업에착수해주시기바랍니다(예정공사착수일이후서명시서명일이공사착수일)."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.86,"top":549.22,"width":507.78,"height":11.59,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"○향후수급사업자의귀책,기존계약범위에포함등의사유로추가/변경작업이아닌것으로객관적으로확인될경우본서면은"}]}]}</script>
  <div class="template-clone template-clone--raster-first-v2-01">
<style>
    :root {
      --canvas:#ececec;
      --paper:#ffffff;
      --shadow:rgba(0,0,0,.12);
    }
    * { box-sizing:border-box; }
    body {
      margin:0;
      background:var(--canvas);
      font-family:"Noto Sans KR","Malgun Gothic","Apple SD Gothic Neo",Arial,sans-serif;
    }
    .viewer {
      padding:24px 14px 40px;
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      align-items:center;
      gap:24px;
    }
    .page {
      position:relative;
      background:var(--paper);
      box-shadow:0 8px 26px var(--shadow);
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .scan-surface {
      position:absolute;
      background-repeat:no-repeat;
      background-size:100% 100%;
      background-position:center center;
    }
    .table-block { position:absolute; }
    .table-grid {
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      display:grid;
    }
    .table-cell { position:relative; min-width:0; min-height:0; overflow:hidden; }
    .raster-block { position:absolute; }
    .hidden-text,
    .semantic-line {
      color:transparent;
      opacity:0;
      user-select:text;
      -webkit-user-select:text;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    .hidden-text {
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      white-space:pre-line;
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .semantic-line {
      position:absolute;
      white-space:pre;
      line-height:1.05;
    }
    @media print {
      body { background:#fff; }
      .viewer { padding:0; gap:0; }
      .page { box-shadow:none; page-break-after:always; }
      .page:last-child { page-break-after:auto; }
    }
  </style>

<style>
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-overlay {
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    z-index:20;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-text,
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row {
    position:absolute;
    pointer-events:auto;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-text {
    display:block;
    min-width:8px;
    min-height:8px;
    color:transparent;
    opacity:.01;
    white-space:pre-wrap;
    line-height:1.15;
    overflow:hidden;
    user-select:text;
    -webkit-user-select:text;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-text:focus {
    color:#111827;
    opacity:1;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
    outline:1px dashed #2563eb;
    overflow:visible;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row {
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:4px;
    opacity:.04;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row:hover,
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row:focus-within {
    opacity:1;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-box {
    width:10px;
    height:10px;
    padding:0;
    border:1px solid #111827;
    background:#fff;
    appearance:none;
    -webkit-appearance:none;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-box[data-checked="1"]::after {
    content:"";
    display:block;
    width:6px;
    height:6px;
    margin:1px;
    background:#111827;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-label {
    position:static;
    opacity:1;
    color:transparent;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-label:focus {
    color:#111827;
  }
</style>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('click', event => {
    const button = event.target.closest('.v201-choice-box');
    if (!button) return;
    const next = button.getAttribute('data-checked') === '1' ? '0' : '1';
    button.setAttribute('data-checked', next);
    button.setAttribute('aria-checked', next === '1' ? 'true' : 'false');
  });
</script>

3.23,"width":111.64,"height":15.05,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"5.원재료지급시조건*"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":155.58,"top":343.23,"width":405.24,"height":15.05,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"해당없음"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.33,"top":361.82,"width":111.64,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"6.공급원가변동에따른"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":155.58,"top":361.82,"width":405.24,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"본계약조건과동일(하도급법준수)"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.33,"top":398.85,"width":111.64,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"7.기타"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":155.58,"top":398.85,"width":405.24,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"1.작업방법은당사품질관리기준에준하여시공(작업전안전교육완료)"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.33,"top":427.76,"width":111.64,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"8.하도급대금연동에"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":155.58,"top":427.76,"width":405.24,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"본계약조건과동일"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.33,"top":459.48,"width":111.64,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"9.첨부파일"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":155.58,"top":459.48,"width":405.24,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"B1F피난안전구역,연결통로환기시설추가공사(26.3월).xlsx"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":155.58,"top":474.9,"width":405.24,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"B1F피난안전구역,연결통호환기시설추가상세도(26.3월).dwg"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":155.58,"top":490.32,"width":405.24,"height":15.42,"fontSize":12.64,"lineHeight":15.42,"fontWeight":400,"text":"B1F피난안전구역,연결통로환기시설추가공사(26.3월).xlsx"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.92,"top":17.59,"width":525.26,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"양식명(코드) 작업지시서(GMS-CPN-001) 문서번호 2603-020593"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":47.11,"top":514.99,"width":234.22,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"상기내용은진행,협의등상황에따라변동될수있습니다."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":47.11,"top":531.55,"width":502.45,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"협력사에서는반드시전자서명완료후에작업에착수해주시기바랍니다(예정공사착수일이후서명시서명일이공사착수일)."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":47.11,"top":548.11,"width":494.76,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"향후수급사업자의귀책,기존계약범위에포함등의사유로추가/변경작업이아닌것으로객관적으로확인될경우본서면은"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.92,"top":560.08,"width":38.33,"height":8.79,"fontSize":11.37,"lineHeight":13.87,"fontWeight":400,"text":"무효입니다."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":35.17,"top":18.91,"width":168.41,"height":7.03,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"양식명(코드):작업지시서(GMS-CPN-001)"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":467.67,"top":18.91,"width":93.09,"height":6.09,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"문서번호:2603-020593"},{"kind":"plain_text","left":35.17,"top":516.72,"width":247.16,"height":6.4,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"○상기내용은진행,협의등상황에따라변동될수있습니다."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":35.17,"top":532.66,"width":515.28,"height":7.34,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"○협력사에서는반드시전자서명완료후에작업에착수해주시기바랍니다(예정공사착수일이후서명시서명일이공사착수일)."},{"kind":"plain_text","left":34.86,"top":549.22,"width":507.78,"height":11.59,"fontSize":9.5,"lineHeight":11.59,"fontWeight":400,"text":"○향후수급사업자의귀책,기존계약범위에포함등의사유로추가/변경작업이아닌것으로객관적으로확인될경우본서면은"}]}]}</script>
  <div class="template-clone template-clone--raster-first-v2-01">
<style>
    :root {
      --canvas:#ececec;
      --paper:#ffffff;
      --shadow:rgba(0,0,0,.12);
    }
    * { box-sizing:border-box; }
    body {
      margin:0;
      background:var(--canvas);
      font-family:"Noto Sans KR","Malgun Gothic","Apple SD Gothic Neo",Arial,sans-serif;
    }
    .viewer {
      padding:24px 14px 40px;
      display:flex;
      flex-direction:column;
      align-items:center;
      gap:24px;
    }
    .page {
      position:relative;
      background:var(--paper);
      box-shadow:0 8px 26px var(--shadow);
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .scan-surface {
      position:absolute;
      background-repeat:no-repeat;
      background-size:100% 100%;
      background-position:center center;
    }
    .table-block { position:absolute; }
    .table-grid {
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      display:grid;
    }
    .table-cell { position:relative; min-width:0; min-height:0; overflow:hidden; }
    .raster-block { position:absolute; }
    .hidden-text,
    .semantic-line {
      color:transparent;
      opacity:0;
      user-select:text;
      -webkit-user-select:text;
      pointer-events:none;
    }
    .hidden-text {
      position:absolute;
      inset:0;
      white-space:pre-line;
      overflow:hidden;
    }
    .semantic-line {
      position:absolute;
      white-space:pre;
      line-height:1.05;
    }
    @media print {
      body { background:#fff; }
      .viewer { padding:0; gap:0; }
      .page { box-shadow:none; page-break-after:always; }
      .page:last-child { page-break-after:auto; }
    }
  </style>

<style>
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-overlay {
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    z-index:20;
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-text,
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row {
    position:absolute;
    pointer-events:auto;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-text {
    display:block;
    min-width:8px;
    min-height:8px;
    color:transparent;
    opacity:.01;
    white-space:pre-wrap;
    line-height:1.15;
    overflow:hidden;
    user-select:text;
    -webkit-user-select:text;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-edit-text:focus {
    color:#111827;
    opacity:1;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
    outline:1px dashed #2563eb;
    overflow:visible;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row {
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:4px;
    opacity:.04;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row:hover,
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-row:focus-within {
    opacity:1;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-box {
    width:10px;
    height:10px;
    padding:0;
    border:1px solid #111827;
    background:#fff;
    appearance:none;
    -webkit-appearance:none;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-box[data-checked="1"]::after {
    content:"";
    display:block;
    width:6px;
    height:6px;
    margin:1px;
    background:#111827;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-label {
    position:static;
    opacity:1;
    color:transparent;
  }
  .template-clone--raster-first-v2-01 .v201-choice-label:focus {
    color:#111827;
  }
</style>
<script>
  document.addEventListener('click', event => {
    const button = event.target.closest('.v201-choice-box');
    if (!button) return;
    const next = button.getAttribute('data-checked') === '1' ? '0' : '1';
    button.setAttribute('data-checked', next);
    button.setAttribute('aria-checked', next === '1' ? 'true' : 'false');
  });
</script>

무효입니다." style="left:40.00px; top:699.60px; width:659.20px; height:26.80px; background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,');"></div><div class="raster-block scan-surface" aria-label="" style="left:633.60px; top:734.80px; width:92.00px; height:36.00px; background-image:url('data:image/png;base64,');"></div><div class="semantic-line" style="left:39.17px; top:18.44px; width:683.39px; font-size:14.56px;">양식명(코드) 작업지시서(GMS-CPN-001) 문서번호 2603-020593</div><div class="semantic-line" style="left:54.77px; top:655.11px; width:310.86px; font-size:14.56px;">상기내용은진행,협의등상황에따라변동될수있습니다.</div><div class="semantic-line" style="left:54.77px; top:676.30px; width:654.20px; font-size:14.56px;">협력사에서는반드시전자서명완료후에작업에착수해주시기바랍니다(예정공사착수일이후서명시서명일이공사착수일).</div><div class="semantic-line" style="left:54.77px; top:697.50px; width:644.36px; font-size:14.56px;">향후수급사업자의귀책,기존계약범위에포함등의사유로추가/변경작업이아닌것으로객관적으로확인될경우본서면은</div><div class="semantic-line" style="left:39.17px; top:712.82px; width:60.12px; font-size:14.56px;">무효입니다.</div></section></main>
  </div>
</section>
```
